concerns.text: FR-009 contains '[deferred] of records' for the subsampling proportion. This leaves the functional behavior undefined — a test cannot verify what proportion to subsample. Per spec 020/023, [deferred] is sanctioned for empirical values, but the proportion itself must be specified for the requirement to be verifiable.
Acceptance Scenario 1 references '[deferred] of the records' for subsampling. Without a defined proportion, the Given/When/Then test cannot be executed deterministically.
